title: Render Props & Portals
content:
# ReactJS Revision

*   **Render vs Commit:** Render phase builds tree changes (interruptible); Commit phase writes changes to DOM (synchronous).
*   **Diffing Heuristics:** $O(N)$ complexity based on component type mapping and stable key checks.
*   **State Batches:** Combines state calls in a single render sweep; update queue resolves updates sequentially.


*   **Render Props & Portals Complexity Reference:** Time $O(N)$, Space $O(1)$ auxiliary.
